endpoints.response_shape: WMS service exposing tiled maps; relevant layers: "Parkplätze Zonen ABC" (with child layers Zone A/B/C), "Mietparkplätze" (rental), "Behindertenparkplätze Punktsymbole" (disabled). Supports CRS:84, EPSG:4326, EPSG:3857, EPSG:2056.
endpoints.notes: WMS provides visual map tiles via GetMap and feature info via GetFeatureInfo. NO live availability data — this is a static cadastre layer for parking infrastructure (zones, rental spots, disabled spots). No WFS schema referenced in capabilities. Useful for understanding Emmen's parking zone topology, not for real-time availability.
